mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND rp.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.permission_id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 1 AND rp.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC
